sentences.arabic: أَرَادَ زِيَادٌ أَنْ يُدَرِّبَ أَخَاهُ الصَّغِيرَ عَلَى السِّبَاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Zijad je htio naučiti svog mlađeg brata plivanju.
sentences.translationEn: Ziyad wanted to train his little brother in swimming.

sentences.arabic: أَخَذَهُ إِلَى حَوْضِ السِّبَاحَةِ وَبَدَأَ التَّدْرِيبَ.
sentences.translation: Odveo ga je u bazen i počeo trening.
sentences.translationEn: He took him to the swimming pool and started training.

sentences.arabic: خَافَ أَخُوهُ فِي الْبِدَايَةِ لَكِنَّ زِيَادًا شَجَّعَهُ.
sentences.translation: Brat se u početku bojao ali ga je Zijad ohrabrio.
sentences.translationEn: His brother was scared at first but Ziyad encouraged him.

sentences.arabic: بَعْدَ أُسْبُوعٍ سَبَحَ الْأَخُ الصَّغِيرُ بِمُفْرَدِهِ.
sentences.translation: Nakon sedmice mlađi brat je sam plivao.
sentences.translationEn: After a week the little brother swam by himself.
